Vanity Fair (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $16,123,851Details
International Box Office $3,000,000
Worldwide Box Office $19,123,851
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,833,900 (30.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.34 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:84.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$23,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,051 opening theaters/1,054 max. theaters, 4.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $31,053,339

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 1st, 2004 (Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: September 30th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: February 1st, 2005 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some sensuality/partial nudity and a brief violent image
Running Time: 141 minutes
Subgenre: Historical Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Focus Features, Tempesta, Granada Productions
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom, India
Languages: English
